question: What is your return policy?
answer: You can return any unused item within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. The product must be in its original packaging with all accessories included.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days within the country. Express shipping (extra charges apply) delivers in 1-2 business days.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Currently we only ship within Pakistan. We're working on expanding to international shipping soon.

question: How can I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link via email and SMS. You can also track it anytime from the 'My Orders' section of your account.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept cash on delivery, credit/debit cards, and bank transfers. Online payments are processed securely through our payment partner.

question: Are your products genuine and authentic?
answer: Yes, all products sold on our store are 100% genuine and sourced directly from authorized distributors or manufacturers.

question: Do products come with a warranty?
answer: Most electronics come with a manufacturer warranty ranging from 6 months to 1 year. Warranty details are listed on each product page.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: You can cancel your order from the 'My Orders' page as long as it hasn't been shipped yet. Once shipped, you'll need to use our return process instead.

question: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
answer: Yes, you can update your delivery address within 2 hours of placing the order by contacting our support team, as long as the order hasn't been dispatched.

question: Do you offer discounts or promo codes?
answer: Yes, we regularly run seasonal sales and offer promo codes through our newsletter and social media pages. Check the homepage banner for current offers.

question: What should I do if I receive a damaged product?
answer: Please contact our support team within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damaged item, and we'll arrange a free replacement or full refund.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click on the 'Sign Up' button at the top of the page, enter your email and a password, and verify your email address to activate your account.

question: I forgot my password, what do I do?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your registered email, and follow the reset link sent to your inbox.

question: How can I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach our support team via live chat on this site, email at support@techdealstore.com, or by calling our helpline listed in the Contact Us page.

question: Do you have a physical store I can visit?
answer: We currently operate as an online-only store, but we do have a pickup point in Lahore for customers who prefer collecting orders in person.

question: What if the price drops after I already bought the product?
answer: If the price drops within 7 days of your purchase, contact support with your order number and we'll refund the difference as store credit.

question: Can I get a refund instead of a replacement?
answer: Yes, once we receive and inspect your returned item, you can choose between a refund to your original payment method or a replacement.

question: How long does a refund take to process?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item. Bank transfers may take a couple of extra days to reflect.

question: Is cash on delivery available everywhere?
answer: Cash on delivery is available in most major cities. For remote areas, only prepaid orders through card or bank transfer are accepted.

question: Do you sell second-hand or refurbished items?
answer: We occasionally list certified refurbished items, clearly marked as 'Refurbished' on the product page, with a shorter warranty period.

question: What are your customer service hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 9 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 6 PM. We're closed on Sundays and public holidays.

question: Can I buy a gift card or voucher?
answer: Yes, we offer digital gift cards in various denominations starting from Rs. 500. They're delivered instantly via email and never expire.

question: Do you have a loyalty or rewards program?
answer: Yes, we have a loyalty program called 'TechRewards'. Earn points with every purchase and redeem them for discounts on future orders.

question: How do I check my order status?
answer: Log in to your account, go to 'My Orders', and click on the order number to view detailed status updates. You'll also receive email notifications at every stage.

question: Can I combine multiple promo codes in one order?
answer: Only one promo code can be applied per order. However, we do have a referral program where you can earn extra credits.

question: What is the delivery charge for my area?
answer: Standard delivery charges are Rs. 199 within city limits and Rs. 299 for out-of-city areas. Free delivery on orders above Rs. 2,500.

question: Will I be notified when my order is shipped?
answer: Absolutely! You'll receive an email and SMS notification with your tracking number as soon as your order ships. You can also track it in real-time.

question: Can I return a product without the original packaging?
answer: Products must be returned in their original packaging. If you don't have it, the return may be rejected or a restocking fee may apply.

question: How do I update my payment method?
answer: You can update your payment method by going to 'Settings' in your account, then 'Payment Methods'. Add a new card or method, then set it as default.

question: What if my order doesn't arrive on time?
answer: While we aim to deliver on time, unforeseen circumstances can cause delays. Contact our support team and we'll investigate and provide an update for you.

question: Are your electronics compatible with Pakistan's voltage?
answer: Yes, all electronics are compatible with Pakistan's voltage (220V-240V) and come with standard Pakistani plugs. International adapters are available separately.

question: Can I request a specific delivery time?
answer: We can't guarantee specific delivery times, but you can leave delivery instructions for the rider, like 'leave at the gate' or 'call before delivery'.

question: Why was my order cancelled by the system?
answer: Orders can be auto-cancelled due to payment issues, address verification problems, or stock unavailability. Contact support with your order number for details.

question: Do you have a student discount?
answer: Yes, students with a valid educational email address get 10% off on all products. Just verify your student status in the account settings.

question: What happens if I refuse the delivery at the door?
answer: Refusing a delivery counts as a returned shipment. A restocking fee may be applied, and standard return charges will apply.

question: Can I exchange a product for a different color or size?
answer: Yes, product exchanges are allowed within 7 days of delivery, subject to stock availability. Contact support to initiate an exchange request.

question: Is my personal data safe on this website?
answer: Yes, we use industry-standard SSL encryption and never share your personal information with third parties. Read our Privacy Policy for details.

question: How do I unsubscribe from emails?
answer: You can unsubscribe by clicking the 'Unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any email, or by managing your preferences in your account settings.

question: What are the sizes of products like?
answer: Product dimensions and size guides are available on each product page. For clothing, we have a detailed size chart to help you choose.

question: Can I order products as a guest?
answer: Yes, you can checkout as a guest without creating an account. However, creating an account allows you to track orders and save payment methods.

question: What if I get a defective product?
answer: We test all products before shipping, but if you receive a defective unit, contact us within 48 hours with video proof, and we'll send a replacement immediately.

question: Do you offer installation services?
answer: For large appliances and electronics, we partner with local technicians for professional installation. Charges vary by product type and location.

question: Can I return a gift someone gave me?
answer: Yes, gifts can be returned for store credit only. The returner can use the order number to initiate a return, and the credit will be added to your account.

question: What is the recommended product for me?
answer: Use our 'Product Finder' tool on the homepage, or describe your needs in chat. Our AI can help suggest the best product for your requirements.

question: Is there any winter sale coming up?
answer: Our Winter Mega Sale starts in December! Watch our social media and newsletter for early access and exclusive discounts.

question: How do I rate a product I bought?
answer: After receiving your order, you'll receive an email asking for a review. You can also go to 'My Orders' and click 'Write a Review'.

question: Can I pick up my order instead of delivery?
answer: Yes, we have a pickup point in Lahore. Select 'Pickup' at checkout and we'll notify you when your order is ready for collection.

question: What happens to my data when I close my account?
answer: When you close your account, we delete your personal information from our system within 30 days, except for records required by law.

question: Can I see reviews before buying?
answer: Yes, each product page features verified customer reviews and ratings. We also have a 'Top Reviews' section highlighting the most helpful feedback.

question: What is the minimum order value?
answer: There is no minimum order value, but orders below Rs. 500 may incur a small handling charge. We recommend adding more items to save on delivery fees.

question: How do I report a fake or counterfeit product?
answer: If you suspect a product is not genuine, contact us immediately with order details and photos. We'll investigate and take appropriate legal action if needed.

question: What eco-friendly initiatives do you support?
answer: We use recyclable packaging, partner with eco-friendly suppliers, and plant one tree for every 100 orders placed through our Green Tech Initiative.

question: Can I schedule a return pickup?
answer: Yes, you can schedule a free return pickup through your account. Our courier partner will collect the item from your doorstep within 24 hours.

question: What are the most popular products right now?
answer: Our top sellers are the latest smartphones, wireless earbuds, smartwatches, and budget-friendly laptops. Check the 'Bestsellers' section on the homepage.

question: How do I become a seller on your platform?
answer: Visit our 'Sell With Us' page, fill out the application form, and our team will review your request. We're always looking for reliable sellers.

question: Can I buy products on installment?
answer: Yes, we offer installment plans through our partner banks. Choose the installment option at checkout and follow the verification process.

question: What if I forget to include an item in my order?
answer: You can modify your order within 1 hour of placing it, as long as it hasn't been processed. After that, place a new order and contact support to avoid extra shipping.

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available for iOS and Android. Download it from the App Store or Google Play for an easier shopping experience.

question: How do I earn referral rewards?
answer: Share your unique referral link with friends. When they make their first purchase, both you and your friend receive Rs. 200 off your next order!

question: What types of products do you sell?
answer: We specialize in electronics, gadgets, smartphones, laptops, accessories, and tech lifestyle products. We also occasionally feature smart home devices.

question: Can I add a product to my wishlist?
answer: Yes, simply click the heart icon on any product page to add it to your wishlist. You'll receive notifications when the price drops.

question: What's the difference between standard and express shipping?
answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 days and is free on orders over Rs. 2,500. Express shipping delivers in 1-2 days and costs Rs. 399.

question: Can I see the product before buying?
answer: We don't have physical stores, but we provide high-quality images, 360-degree views, and detailed descriptions. We also offer a satisfaction guarantee.

question: What happens if there's a shortage in my order?
answer: In case of missing items, contact us within 24 hours with your order number and list of missing items. We'll arrange a refund or ship the missing items.

question: How can I get help with technical issues on the site?
answer: Contact our tech support at techsupport@techdealstore.com or use the live chat feature for immediate assistance with website issues.

question: Do you sell accessories for specific products?
answer: Yes, each product page has a 'Frequently Bought Together' section with compatible accessories like cases, chargers, cables, and screen protectors.

question: Can I request a product not listed on the site?
answer: Absolutely! Contact us with the product details and we'll try to source it for you. You can also suggest products in our community forum.

question: What's the best way to clean my new electronics?
answer: Use a soft microfiber cloth for screens. For ports and crevices, use compressed air. Avoid liquids and harsh chemicals. Check product manuals for specific care.

question: Does the price include sales tax?
answer: Yes, all prices displayed include applicable sales tax. International orders may be subject to additional customs duties.

question: Can I use someone else's account to make a purchase?
answer: It's against our policies to use someone else's account. You can use the gift card or guest checkout options instead.
